challenge.title: Korak 15
challenge.description: Sada, promeni rutinu for i deklaraciju if koju si dodao u prethodnom koraku, i deklaraciju if koja koristi funkciju unutar any().

challengeFiles.name: main

tests.text: Uslov za vašu novu deklaraciju za if mora biti poziv na any().
tests.testString:
({ test: () => runPython(`
cond = _Node(_code).find_class("Equation").find_function("__init__").find_ifs()[1].find_conditions()[0]
calls = _Node(str(cond)).find_calls("any")
assert len(calls) == 1
`) })

tests.text: Treba da prosledite pridevni izraz kao argument za vaš poziv od any().
tests.testString:
({ test: () => runPython(`
import ast
argument = _Node(_code).find_class("Equation").find_function("__init__").find_ifs()[1].find_conditions()[0].find_call_args()[0]
assert isinstance(argument.tree, ast.GeneratorExp)
`) })

tests.text: Izjava generatora koja se prenosi za any() treba da ponovi preko args.
tests.testString:
({ test: () => runPython(`
import ast
argument = _Node(_code).find_class("Equation").find_function("__init__").find_ifs()[1].find_conditions()[0].find_call_args()[0]
iters = argument.find_comp_iters()
assert len(iters) == 1
assert iters[0].is_equivalent("args")
`) })

tests.text: Izjava za if mora proveriti da li bilo koji argument u args nije primer od int ili float.
tests.testString:
({ test: () => runPython(`
import ast
argument = _Node(_code).find_class("Equation").find_function("__init__").find_ifs()[1].find_conditions()[0].find_call_args()[0]
target = argument.find_comp_targets()[0]
expr = argument.find_comp_expr()
solutions = [
  f"not isinstance({target}, (int, float))",
  f"not isinstance({target}, (float, int))",
  f"not isinstance({target}, float) and not isinstance({target}, int)",
  f"not isinstance({target}, int) and not isinstance({target}, float)",
]
assert any(expr.is_equivalent(sol) for sol in solutions)
`) })

tests.text: Trebalo bi da koristiš niz karaktera TypeError unutar svog novog izraza if.
tests.testString:
({ test: () => assert(runPython(`_Node(_code).find_class("Equation").find_function("__init__").find_ifs()[1].find_bodies()[0].has_stmt("raise TypeError(\\"Coefficients must be of type 'int' or 'float'\\")")
`)) })

challengeFiles.name: main
